visuals.title: First-Order Logic Syntax
visuals.description: Visual diagram for First-Order Logic Syntax
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Representation Revisited</text>
  
  <!-- World/Reality -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="120" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    World/Reality
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Mental Model -->
  <rect x="250" y="70" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Mental Model
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from World to Mental Model -->
  <path d="M170 100 L 250 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Representation Process -->
  <text x="210" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Representation Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- External Representation -->
  <rect x="150" y="180" width="120" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    External Representation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Mental Model to External Representation -->
  <path d="M310 130 L 310 180 L 270 180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from External Representation to Mental Model -->
  <path d="M150 180 L 110 180 L 110 130 L 250 130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Interpretation Process -->
  <text x="210" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Interpretation Process
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Feedback Loop -->
  <path d="M270 180 C 300 200, 300 240, 270 260 L 250 260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M150 180 C 120 200, 120 240, 150 260 L 170 260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Cycle Label -->
  <text x="210" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Continuous Cycle
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
